posts.author: rickvanhaften (rick van haften)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I’m starting this month with using monday and i’m searching how everything works.

Template board ‘Regeling’

Template board1578×762 105 KB

I have made a template board named ‘regeling’. When the status on a other board (board 1) changes to done the automation makes a new emty board from te template. In this template are many pre-made items.

I want the data from board 1 to copy to different item rows and columns in the new board ‘regelingen’. Is this possible ?

Board 1

Board 11530×527 44.2 KB
